name: Aru Valley
description: A deeply serene, pristine village surrounded by majestic snow-capped peaks and meadows. It serves as the base camp for several high-altitude treks including the Kolahoi Glacier.
history: A traditional Gujjar and Bakarwal settlement that has maintained its pristine ecological beauty over centuries.
famousFor: Scenic meadows, horseback riding, trekking base camp.
